data.body: 21dd CLAIMED. RED phase: full held-out oracle (18 tests) run -> 16 failed for right reasons (ImportError rebar._store.compat absent; 'write not blocked'; 'fsck --repair must be blocked'; 'lock.acquire does not call check_store_compat'), 2 pass = don't-over-block guards (absent pass-through, dry-run not gated). Held out full oracle to tmp/test_store_compat_gate.py; placed happy-path subset tests/interfaces/contracts/test_store_compat_happy.py in tree for implementer. Handing off to implementation subagent with brief_21dd.md + happy-path only.
